apiKey.label: Anthropic API Key
apiKey.placeholder: sk-ant-... (or leave blank to use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var)
apiKey.help: API key for Anthropic Claude. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.

model.label: Extraction Model
model.help: Claude model used for memory extraction. Haiku is recommended for speed and cost.

minMessages.label: Minimum Messages
minMessages.help: Minimum number of messages in a conversation before extraction runs.

cooldownMinutes.label: Cooldown (minutes)
cooldownMinutes.help: Minimum minutes between extraction runs for the same session.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable automatic memory extraction.
